context: Tests whether the agent handles advanced Apple Pay request types and sibling-skill boundaries for a travel marketplace.

checklist.name: Advanced request exclusivity
checklist.description: Notes that one `PKPaymentRequest` can set only one optional advanced request type and applies that limit to recurring, deferred, and multi-token contexts.

checklist.name: Recurring payment
checklist.description: Uses `PKRecurringPaymentRequest` with `PKRecurringPaymentSummaryItem`, interval unit/count, billing agreement or management URL, and `request.recurringPaymentRequest`.

checklist.name: Coupon update
checklist.description: Enables `supportsCouponCode`, handles `paymentAuthorizationController(_:didChangeCouponCode:handler:)`, and returns `PKPaymentRequestCouponCodeUpdate` with errors, payment summary items, and shipping methods.

checklist.name: Multi-token contexts
checklist.description: Uses `PKPaymentTokenContext` entries with merchant identifier, external identifier, merchant name/domain, and `NSDecimalNumber` amounts for multi-merchant tokens.

checklist.name: Deferred payment
checklist.description: Uses `PKDeferredPaymentRequest` with `PKDeferredPaymentSummaryItem`, deferred or cancellation date details, and a management URL.

checklist.name: Sibling boundaries
checklist.description: Keeps FinanceKit financial-data access and StoreKit digital purchase implementation outside the PassKit guidance.

checklist.name: Checkout split
checklist.description: Recommends separate Apple Pay requests or flows when recurring, multi-token, and deferred modes cannot be combined, and keeps token processing or payment orchestration on the backend.
